note: Regex signatures scanned line-by-line. 'pattern' is a JavaScript regex source; 'flags' are applied per line (the scanner always adds 'g'). Language-independent unless stated.

signatures.title: ChatGPT turn0search/turn0image citation placeholders
signatures.note: Placeholder code left when a ChatGPT conversation with links is pasted in. Near-definitive.

signatures.title: Reference markup bug (contentReference / oaicite / oai_citation)
signatures.note: ChatGPT reference-markup bug in place of links. Near-definitive.

signatures.title: ChatGPT attribution/attributableIndex JSON blobs
signatures.note: JSON code appended to sentence ends by ChatGPT. Near-definitive.

signatures.title: Grok citation card markup
signatures.note: grok-card / grok_render_citation_card_json artifacts. Near-definitive for Grok.

signatures.title: Perplexity-style [attached_file:N] / [web:N] markers
signatures.note: Seen at sentence ends; may be Perplexity-specific.

signatures.title: Gemini-style [cite: N] markers
signatures.note: [cite: 1] or [cite: 3, 12, 13] style markers copied from Google Gemini.

signatures.title: DeepSeek lenticular-bracket citation markers
signatures.note: Markup like 、85†L261-269】, specific to DeepSeek and derivatives.

signatures.title: Markdown fenced code block with wikitext
signatures.note: ```wikitext fences indicate copy-paste from a chatbot that mixed Markdown and wikitext.

signatures.title: Footnote return arrows (↩)
signatures.note: The ↩ character is used by some chatbot interfaces to indicate footnotes.

signatures.title: AI utm_source / referrer parameters in URLs
signatures.note: utm_source=chatgpt.com|openai|copilot.com or referrer=grok.com. Near-definitively proves a chatbot was involved (not necessarily that it wrote the prose).

signatures.title: Placeholder date in citation (2025-XX-XX)
signatures.note: LLMs insert placeholder dates like 2025-XX-XX into access-date/date fields.

signatures.title: Placeholder URL/source token in citation
signatures.note: Tokens like INSERT_SOURCE_URL, PASTE_..._HERE, SOURCE_PUBLISHER left in citations.

signatures.title: Spaced em dashes
signatures.note: AI em dashes are usually surrounded by spaces, contrary to typographic norms. Weak on its own; strongest combined with other signs.

signatures.title: Curly quotation marks / apostrophes
signatures.note: ChatGPT/DeepSeek use curly quotes. Weak: smart-quote features, macOS/iOS, Word, and typeset works also produce these; Gemini/Claude usually do not.
